name: mcp-server-contentful
description: Update, create, delete content, content-models and assets in your Contentful Space.

rating.reason: The toolset has clear, descriptive names and generally good functionality descriptions. Most parameters are well-documented with clear purposes and constraints. However, some descriptions are overly verbose (create_entry, update_entry), while others lack sufficient detail (get_entry, delete_asset). Parameter documentation is generally strong but inconsistent - some tools have excellent examples and constraints while others have minimal descriptions. The repetitive spaceId description across tools and some technical inconsistencies (like the list_content_types limit description mismatch) prevent this from reaching an A grade.
